scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter @coffee-pos/web exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter @coffee-pos/web exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter @coffee-pos/web exec prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
